comment: Recently the searching option completely messed up on my phone, when I type in something, instead of it there are either unrelated pins or buzzfeed quizzes....I'm not sure if it's because of the recent update, but I never had this issue before
the function of activity: Activity involves searching, accessing menus, filtering, viewing various content categories, managing pins, profiles, settings, creating, sharing, and navigating within the interface.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Lens', 'description': 'Camera Search'}, {'name': 'Search for Ideas', 'description': 'Search for content related to your idea.'}]
